svg.aria-label: Harness reference architecture, drawn bottom-up in seven layers. L1 the work: the repository, branches and data. L2 the enforcement plane, the thickest band: settings.json permissions.deny, PreToolUse hooks exiting 2, the tools allowlist, and maxTurns, all enforced by shell scripts and glob matching with no model consulted, and proven by a 15 out of 15 guardrail eval. L3 the state plane: the master plan board, the task files with their session logs, and the append-only run archive, all durable on disk. L4 the context plane: always-RAM and lazy-RAM, volatile and billed every turn. L5 the policy plane: 14 rules, the agent bodies, and the data-classification table, advisory only. A red boundary line marks that everything below it is unchanged when you swap the model. L6 the model slot: a dashed socket holding the seat-tier bindings, judgment to opus, implementation to sonnet, mechanical to haiku, with a dashed not-built zone for other vendors. L7 orchestration, which runs on the model. A footnote states the honest limit: model tier is swappable, model vendor is not.
svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.title: Harness reference architecture - the model is the only swappable layer
svg.text: Harness reference architecture - the model is the only swappable layer
Drawn bottom-up. Each layer names who enforces it, and whether it survives a model swap.
L7 ORCHESTRATION
RUNS ON THE MODEL
enforced by: nobody. It is the sequence the orchestrator is asked to follow - a procedure, not a gate.
orchestrator routes -> spec-guardian locks the contract -> dev implements -> qa-test ->
code-reviewer + security-reviewer (gates, read-only) -> merge
An agent's 'done' is a claim - verified against git and the session log, never taken on trust.
L6 THE MODEL SLOT
THE SWAPPABLE PART
Agents declare a seat tier; the tier binds to a model. model-policy.md holds that binding table.
SOLID - delivered: opus, sonnet and haiku are bound below. fable is accepted by model: but no seat binds it.
JUDGMENT -> opus
orchestrator, debugger,
code-reviewer,
security-reviewer, merge-manager
IMPLEMENTATION -> sonnet
the dev seats, qa-test,
data-modeler, db-engineer,
devops, ba-analyst, spec-guardian
MECHANICAL -> haiku
history-tracker, db-seeder,
sast-runner (audit mode)
fixed procedure, no judgment
DASHED - not built: other vendors, which would need an execution adapter.
Claude Code frontmatter accepts only opus | sonnet | haiku | fable. A vendor swap is a PORT, not a config change.
Everything BELOW this line is unchanged when you swap the model
L5 POLICY PLANE - advisory
SURVIVES A MODEL SWAP
enforced by: nobody. It shapes behaviour. It is NOT a hard enforcement layer.
.claude/rules/ - 14 rules | the agent bodies | the data-classification table in model-policy.md
Public / Internal / Confidential / Restricted. Classification beats seat tier - a rule about data, not about a model.
L4 CONTEXT PLANE - volatile, budgeted
SURVIVES A MODEL SWAP
enforced by: the context window. Billed every turn. Lost on compaction.
Always-RAM: CLAUDE.md -> @AGENTS.md, 6 unconditional rules, the agent body, the tool schemas
Lazy-RAM: 8 path-scoped rules - loaded only on a matching file touch. 66% of the rule content.
L3 STATE PLANE - durable, on disk
SURVIVES A MODEL SWAP
enforced by: git. Committed markdown, written by the agent AS IT WORKS.
docs/tasks/master-plan.md - the board. One row per task: ID, owner, status.
docs/tasks/active/TASK-NNN.md - goal, acceptance criteria, decisions, and an append-only session log.
.claude/state/history/ - run archive, written by a hook on SubagentStop. Gitignored - machine-local.
Survives compaction, session end, a dead IDE. A fresh agent resumes from here.
L2 ENFORCEMENT PLANE - the reins
SURVIVES A MODEL SWAP
enforced by: shell scripts and glob matching. No model is consulted.
settings.json permissions.deny -> cannot SEE: .env, *.pem, *.key, id_rsa*, secrets/**, + your Restricted paths
PreToolUse hooks, exit 2 -> cannot DO: protect-secrets, guard-main-commit, check-commit-msg, protect-adr
tools: allowlist -> cannot REACH: reviewers get Read, Grep, Glob, Bash - never Edit or Write
maxTurns -> the circuit breaker on a stuck agent: debugger 30, code-reviewer 25, history-tracker 10
python eval/guardrail_eval.py -> 15/15 blocked. No model is in the loop, so the result cannot depend on one.
L1 THE WORK
SURVIVES A MODEL SWAP
The repository, the branches, the data. What every layer above exists to protect.
The one thing here the harness cannot regenerate.
THE HONEST LIMIT (docs/ASSESSMENT.md, Gap 2)
Model TIER is swappable. Model VENDOR is not: Claude Code frontmatter accepts only opus | sonnet | haiku | fable.
Re-pointing this roster at a self-hosted or third-party model is a PORT, not a config change. No adapter ships here.
The tier table is policy, not a generator: each agent file still names its own model: directly today.
deterministic - enforced by the harness
model / advisory
artifact - file on disk
dashed - volatile, or not built
